fact_nuggets.text: Solar Power (Japanese: Sun Power) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Boosts Special Attack in sunny weather, though the Pokemon also loses HP. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD When it's sunny or in harsh sunlight, the Pokemon's Sp. Atk goes up sharply, but the Pokemon can't restore its HP naturally and keeps taking damage! MD RT DX During Sunny weather or in Extremely Harsh Sunlight, the Pokemon's Sp. Atk goes up sharply, but the Pokemon can't restore its HP naturally and keeps taking damage.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During harsh sunlight , Solar Power increases the Pokemon's Special Attack by 1.5, but the Pokemon loses 1/8 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn, if harsh sunlight does not end that turn. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Solar Power has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] During harsh sunlight , Solar Power increases the Pokemon's Special Attack by 1.5, but the Pokemon loses 1/8 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn, if harsh sunlight does not end that turn.
Increases Special Attack to 1.5 but costs 1/8 max HP after each turn during strong sunlight.
